card.name: Expedition Champion
card.text: Vigilance When Expedition Champion enters, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control. • Untap each creature you control.

card.name: (flasher) // (Thesis)
card.text:
Flash (flasher) enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (The seizer of thoughts) // Thoughtseize
card.text:
Lifelink (The seizer of thoughts) enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Wrathful Rebuttal
card.text: Damage dealt by Wrathful Rebuttal can't be prevented. Wrathful Rebuttal deals 6 damage to any nonplayer target. You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Utopist Guide
card.text: Flying Whenever Utopist Guide attacks, defending player choose a creature they control. That creature gains reach until end of turn. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: (Sculptor) // (Make Helper)
card.text:
(Sculptor) enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a colorless artifact token with "Tap two untapped creatures you control: This artifact becomes a 4/4 artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Withdraw into Thought // Jostle
card.text:
Enchant creature Withdraw into Thought enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Enchanted creature can't become untapped and loses all abilities.
---
Tap or untap target permanent.

card.name: Dark Artisan
card.text: Menace When Dark Artisan dies, choose one — • Target creature you control becomes prepared. • Remove three counters from target permanent.

card.name: (flinger but not)
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature. (flinger but not) deals 3 damage to any target. If you sacrificed a creature to cast this spell, (flinger but not) deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power instead.

card.name: Azoren Liason
card.text: Flying, vigilance Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: (copy copy)
card.text: Choose one — • Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control with mana value 3 or less. You may choose new targets for the copy. • Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Preserved Hellkite // Lingering Necrosis
card.text:
Flying Preserved Hellkite enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Enchant nontoken creature When enchanted creature dies, exile it. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: (Smash and repurpose)
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +4/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact. If a token was destroyed this way, create a Treasure token.

card.name: (Become Steve)
card.text: Enchant land you control Enchanted land is a 4/5 creature with trample and haste. It's still a land. If enchanted land would be destroyed, instead sacrifice (Become Steve) and that land gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Census Keeper // (Populate but not)
card.text:
Flying Census Keeper enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a token that's a copy of a token you control.

card.name: Consult
card.text: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.

card.name: Whispering Ancient
card.text: Whenever a token enters under your control, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: (Hexagonize)
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.") Draw a card.

card.name: Cherished Dancer // (Help wish)
card.text:
Cherished Dancer enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Cherished Dancer.
---
You gain 4 life.

card.name: Absorbing Information
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card you've drawn this turn. Target creature's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Stoneshroud Wurm
card.text: When Stoneshroud Wurm enters, scry 2. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Stoneshroud Wurm gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Tyrant of Nowhere
card.text: Haste Whenever you draw your second card each turn, Tyrant of Nowhere gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Caravan Sage
card.text: During your turn, Caravan Sage has deathtouch. When Caravan Sage dies, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: Hand of the Azoren
card.text: Lifelink When Hand of the Azoren enters, create a 1/1 artifact Scout creature token. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Superego Agent
card.text: Flying When Superego Agent enters, you may exile target permanent you control without flying, then return it to the battlefield tapped at the beginning of your next end step. Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Distorted Witness
card.text: When Distorted Witness dies, create a Thesis token and you lose 1 life. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (PRolifera5te nonsense)
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. For each kind of counter on any number of target permanents you control, put another counter of that kind on it or remove one from it.

card.name: (Anthem)
card.text: Flying Other creatures you control get +0/+1.

card.name: (Flash Flyer)
card.text: Flash Flying When (Flash Flyer) enters, you may tap or untap target permanent.

card.name: Umwelder Artisan
card.text: Flying When Umwelder Artisan enters, create two 1/1 colorless Scout artifact creature tokens. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: (Sphinx of Eviction)
card.text: Flying Whenever (Sphinx of Eviction) enters, it deals 3 damage to target creature or battle. If a creature dealt damage this way would die this turn, put it on the bottom if its owner's library instead.

card.name: (Removal)
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn if it's enchanted. Then that creature fights up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: (Blade)
card.text: (Blade) gets +1/+3 as long as you control three or more artifacts.

card.name: (Very Swell Guard)
card.text: Menace, reach (Very Swell Guard) gets +1/+0 as long as you've cast a noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: (cathar crusader who)
card.text: Flash Reach {1}{G}, Sacrifice (cathar crusader who): Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: (Buttfighter)
(Thesiser)
card.text: When (Thesiser) enters, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.") Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on (Thesiser).

card.name: Skeletal Repurposing
card.text: Enchant creature you control When Skeletal Repurposing enters, exile target creature or planeswalker you don't control. Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.

card.name: Fervent Outcast
card.text: Reach Whenever an artifact you control enters, Fervent Outcast deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Deep Jungle Tracker // Wild Growth
card.text:
Deep Jungle Tracker enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

Enchant land Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}.

card.name: Query Guardian
card.text: When Query Guardian enters, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (untapper)
card.text: Whenever (untapper) becomes tapped, untap another target permanent. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: (Edict)
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature. If they sacrificed a creature with mana value 1 or less, create a tapped Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.text: Flying When Scitoran Overseer enters, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Wonders of the World
card.text: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Indulgent Beholder
card.text: Vigilance When Indulgent Beholder enters, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: Pain Rewiring
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When Pain Rewiring enters, enchanted creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +2/+0.

card.name: (Prowesser) // (Look around)
card.text:
Prowess (Prowesser) enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: (dig a tunnel)
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card and/or a land card from among them and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: (Smashing Through)
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains lifelink until end of turn. • Exile target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Deft Deflection
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. • Counter target activated or triggered ability from a nonland source unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: (Trick of tricks)
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Flashback {3}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Manifested Bugbear

card.name: Life Flashes, Death Lingers
card.text: Lifelink If you would gain life, you instead gain 1 life that many times. {3}{W}: Create a 1/1 ?? creature token. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Masks on Blank Canvas
card.text: Prowess Boast — {T}: Create a blue 3/3 Elemental creature token. Draw a card. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Whispers Reverberating
card.text: Double strike, menace, trample Other creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Violence Not as a Means
card.text: Reach, trample, haste At the beginning of your second main phase, Violence Not as a Means gets +3/+4 until end of turn.

card.name: Spoken Without Meaning
card.text: Lifelink Whenever Spoken Without Meaning attacks or blocks, it gets -X/+X until end of turn, where X is its power.

card.name: Right Moment Never Comes
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell. Right Moment Never Comes deals 3 damage to that spell's controller. • Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Memory Rots the Truth
card.text: Memory Rots the Truth's power is equal to the number of card types among cards in your graveyard and its toughness is equal to that number plus 1. At the beginning of your end step, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, you may put a card you own from outside the game that doesn't a type with that card into your graveyard.

card.name: Following Ruin's Wake
card.text: Other attacking creatures you control get -2/-0. Whenever Following Ruin's Wake attacks, other creatures you control gain double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Hope Crushed by Reason
card.text: Flying Hope Crushed by Reason can attack while it's tapped, but not while it's untapped. You have hexproof.

card.name: Time Flowing Sideways
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. You can't activate abilities of permanents you control and creatures you control can't attack players during that turn. Exile Time Flowing Sideways.

card.name: Limits of the Umwelt
card.text: Choose one — • Put five +1/+1 counters on target creature, then destroy it. • Put five loyalty counters on target planeswalker, then destroy it.

card.name: (First spell from hand Storm)
card.text: Flying Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. The first spell you cast each turn from your hand has storm. (When you cast that spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Observed Only in Death
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Observed Only in Death deals combat damage, mill three cards. {2}{B}, Discard Observed Only in Death: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Quickly Going Nowhere
card.text: Creatures you control that have entered this turn get +2/+0. When Quickly Going Nowhere enters, create two 1/1 colorless Scout artifact creature tokens.

card.name: Detailed Blurred by Dreams
card.text: Draw two cards. At the beginning of the next end step, put three cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

card.name: Actions Reflect Thought
card.text: You can't cast Actions Reflect Thought if you control three or more permanents. Flying, double strike, lifelink Discard a card: Actions Reflect Thought gains hexproof until end of turn. Tap it. --- (Back): Wistful Sphinx

card.name: Wistful Sphinx
card.text: Flying, first strike, lifelink Discard a card: Counter target spell that targets Wistful Sphinx if it has the same mana value as the discarded card. --- (Front): Actions Reflect Thought

card.name: One is a Harmony
card.text: Slivers you control get +1/+1, have menace, and have "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and you draw a card."

card.name: Words Carved by Swords
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) Prevent all damage that would be dealt to Words Carved by Swords. When Words Carved by Swords enters or is defeated, return up to one target creature card in your graveyard to the battlefield with a menace counter on it.

card.name: Tome of Unwritten Rules
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature and a +1/+1 counter on Tome of Unwritten Rules. When Tome of Unwritten Rules leaves the battlefield, put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Peel the Empty Shell
card.text: Choose one — • Create a Force of Savagery token. (It's a {2}{G} 8/0 Elemental creature with trample.) • Exile target nonland permanent with mana value 4 or greater. • Double the number of each kind of counter on target permanent.

card.name: Souls Shaped like Muscles
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is 1 plus the number of cards exiled with this enchantment.

card.name: The Self Made from Parts
card.text: Draw three cards. If you control another spell, draw a card. Otherwise, discard a card.

card.name: (No way of gaining loyalty, but has ult

card.name: Relentless March of Time
card.text: Relentless March of Time has first strike as long as it's attacking. Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/1 white Advisor creature token. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, create a 4/4 red Elemental creature token with flying instead. Tokens created this way enter tapped and attacking.

card.name: Choices Splitting Timelines
card.text: Flash Whenever you cast this spell, counter it. When you do, counter up to one target spell. Flying When Choices Splitting Timelines enters, if you cast it, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Apex, Out of Reach
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control no permanents other than Apex and have no cards in hand, you win the game.

card.name: Ecosystem Acts as One
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever Ecosystem Acts as One deals combat damage to a noncreature, draw a card, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Vibrance Leached onto Sand
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Until end of turn, Vibrance Leached onto Sand gains "{2}, {T}: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with ‘This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.' It can't block this turn."

card.name: Nature Wrought by Nuture
card.text: When Nature Wrought by Nuture enters tapped, put a ??? counter on it. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. You gain 1 life. Activate only if Nature Wrought by Nuture has a ??? counter on it.

card.name: (Prepare Land)
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}, Exile three cards from your graveyard: Target creature becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)

card.name: Sheltering Catacombs
card.text: Sheltering Catacombs enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Rugged Haven
card.text: Rugged Haven enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Depleted Expanse
card.text: Depleted Expanse enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Wayward Vantage
card.text: Wayward Vantage enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Remoreseless Dunes
card.text: Remoreseless Dunes enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Boundless Jungle
card.text: Boundless Jungle enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Book Wurm
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Each spell a player casts costs {1} more to cast for each other spell that player has cast this turn.

card.name: Brain Teaser
card.text: Reach When Brain Teaser enters, you may discard a card. If you do, search your library for a riddle card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Painter of Distant Worlds
card.text: Tap an untapped permanent you control, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: (Evolving Wilds riff)
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice (Evolving Wilds riff): Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice (Evolving Wilds riff): Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Ash Barrens
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Basic landcycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Azoren Redactor
card.text: Flash Flying When Azoren Redactor enters, you may exile target non-Advisor permanent. For as long as it remains exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.

card.name: (Combat trick)
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. Flashback—Exile two black and/or red cards from your graveyard. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: (Push for Ramp)
card.text: (Push for Ramp) can't be countered Trample Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.) (Push for Ramp) enters with twice X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Where to Go from Here
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Where to Go from Here enters or is defeated, create two 1/1 colorless Scout artifact creature tokens.

card.name: (Push for Tokenfall)
card.text: Lifelink Whenever (Push for Tokenfall) or a nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 white Advisor creature token.

card.name: Capricious Orator
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your first main phase, you may discard a card. If you do, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (Bitterness)
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has deathtouch. When (Bitterness) is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return (Bitterness) to its owner's hand.

card.name: (Push for Artifacts)
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on (Push for Artifacts). Whenever (Push for Artifacts) attacks, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: (Push for Flashgrro
card.text: Flash When (Push for Flashgrro enters, choose one — • Counter up to one target activated or triggered ability from a nonland source. • Draw a card.

card.name: Throughline Navigator
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on Throughline Navigator. Scry 1.

card.name: Wretch of the Deep Earth
card.text: Menace Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, torment each opponent loses 3 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice or discards a card.

card.name: Worldshaper Apprentice // Prismatic Lens
card.text:
Worldshaper Apprentice enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, Worldshaper Apprentice becomes prepared.
---
{T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Bridled Essence
card.text: Bridled Essence's power is equal to the number of creatures you control. Other creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Enforcer of Unity
card.text: Affinity for tokens (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each token you control.) Flying Whenever a token you control enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you you gain 1 life.

card.name: Leyline Roamer
card.text: When Leyline Roamer enters, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.") Whenever Leyline Roamer attacks, if you've drawn two or more cards this turn, it becomes a 5/5 Elemental with flying until end of turn.

card.name: Whisperer of the Forbidden // Ancient Majesty
card.text:
Menace Whenever another enchanted creature you control dies, Whisperer of the Forbidden becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control.

card.name: (Payoff for Artifacts)
card.text: Haste Whenever (Payoff for Artifacts) attacks, you may tap two untapped artifacts you control. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: (Playstyle) // (Don't touch
card.text:
Flash Flying Whenever (Playstyle) deals combat damage to a player, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Counter target permanent spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Imposing Precedent
card.text: Flash Flying Spells with the chosen name cost {3} more to cast and spells prepared permanents with the chosen name cost {3} more to cast.

card.name: (make duders)
card.text: Create two 1/1 blue Shapeshifter creature tokens with changeling. (This card is every creature type.)

card.name: Parvin Battle-Scholar
card.text: Whenever you attack, choose one — • Copy target triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. • Untap target creature you control.

card.name: (Duder) // (Make dude)
card.text:
Whenever you cast an Aura spell, (Duder) becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a 1/1 colorless Scout artifact creature token. You gain 1 life.

card.name: (Dwarf of Dwarfiness) // Lotus Petal
card.text:
Whenever you cast your first nonartifact, noncreature spell each turn, (Dwarf of Dwarfiness) becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
{T}, Sacrifice Lotus Petal: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: (artifact lover)
card.text: Vigilance When (artifact lover) enters, exile target nonland permanent you don't control with mana value equal to or less than the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Retroactive Continuity
card.text: Counter target spell. Untap up to three permanents you control.

card.name: (Demon lover) // (Deal With Demon)
card.text:
Menace {B}, Sacrifice another creature: (Demon lover) becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has "Sacrifice another creature: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it."

card.name: (Looks at Dead Bodies)
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Whenever an enchanted creature you control dies, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: Tempest Queller
card.text: Flying Nonbasic lands enter tapped. Noncreature spells cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Learning to Learn
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Learning to Learn enters or is defeated, draw two cards.

card.name: (Riddle Solver)
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your end step, you may return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is the number of times you gained life this turn.

card.name: (Concher)
card.text: Haste When (Concher) dies, you may discard a card. If you do, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (slimer) //
card.text:
(slimer) enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) When (slimer) enters, destroy target noncreature, nonland permanent you don't control.
---
Return target noncreature, nonland permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Quarantine Warden // Banishing Light
card.text:
Flash Flying Quarantine Warden enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
When Banishing Light enters, exile target nonland permanent until Banishing Light leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Shifting Goalposts
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Shifting Goalposts enters or is defeated, exile up to one target nonland permanent you don't control. For as long as that card remains exiled, its owner may cast it. A spell cast this way costs {2} more to cast.

card.name: (Get duders)
card.text: Create two 2/2 black Horror creature tokens. Flashback—{4}{B}, Sacrifice a creature. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: (Sword)
(Prepared...) //
card.text:
Flash (Prepared...) enters tapped and prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
The next creature spell you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash. That spell can't be countered. That creature enters tapped.

card.name: Null Hypothesis
card.text: Exile target artifact, creature, or planeswalker. Its controller creates a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (Get that thesis)
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control die, you create a Thesis token and you lose 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (Artifact Engine)
card.text: Whenever (Artifact Engine) enters and you draw your second card each turn, put a charge counter on (Artifact Engine). {2}, {T}: Remove any number of counters from (Artifact Engine). Put twice that many +1/+1 counters on target permanent you control. You may have it becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Essence Parasite
card.text: Flash Reach When Essence Parasite enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, you gain X life and draw X cards, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: (Tappytapyp)
card.text: Choose up to two. You may choose the same mode more than once but each mode must choose a different target. • Untap target creature. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. • Tap target creature. Put a stun counter on it.

card.name: (Become a Cool Guy)
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card and put a ?? counter on (Become a Cool Guy). Then if there are ?? or more ?? counters on it, you may have it become a 4/4 blue Sphinx creature with flying.

card.name: (Enchantment farming)
card.text: Menace Ward—Pay 2 life. As an additional cost to cast an enchantment spell, you may pay {X} and X life, where X it that spell's mana value. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copies.

card.name: (Big Sphinx)
card.text: Flying Whenever (Big Sphinx) attacks, choose target creature defending player controls. That creature's controller may tap it. If they don't, creatures you control gain menace until end of turn.

card.name: (land...) // (Lander)
card.text:
Trample Whenever (land...) attacks, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Enchant land Enchanted land is a 4/4 creature with haste and "When this land dies, return it to the battlefield tapped." It's still a land

card.name: Transcendent Parvin
card.text: Flying When Transcendent Parvin enters, tap target nonland permanent an opponent controls and put two stun counters on it. It loses all abilities until it untaps.

card.name: (Unpleasant Minion)
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Whenever you cast a creature spell, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Parvin Familiar // Anthing is Pawsible
card.text:
At the beginning of your end step, Parvin Familiar becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Copy target activated or triggered ability from a non-Cat source you control.

card.name: Aloof Occlusion
card.text: • Untap target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn. • Counter target activated or triggered ability from a nonland source.

card.name: (Smash)
card.text: (Smash) deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. Scry 1.

card.name: (Big Man Sphinxtoise)
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever (Big Man Sphinxtoise) enters, create two Thesis tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.") Whenever (Big Man Sphinxtoise) attacks, you may shuffle your library.

card.name: Beating a Dead Horse
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Beating a Dead Horse enters, exile target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it. When Beating a Dead Horse is defeated, return the exiled card to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: (The Doubler) cara
card.text: When (The Doubler) cara enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {2}{G}{G}: For any number of permanents you control, choose a kind of counter on it. You may give that permanent another of that kind or remove one from it.

card.name: Pursuit of Perfection
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Pursuit of Perfection enters, you gain 3 life and draw a card. When Pursuit of Perfection is defeated, distribute three +1/+1 counters among creatures you control.

card.name: (Flying gnat)
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever (Flying gnat) enters, create a tapped Thesis token and put two stun counters on the token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: (by itself)
card.text: You may cast sorcery spells as though they had flash. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 colorless Scout artifact creature token.

card.name: Mineshaft Foreman // Collapsing Charges
card.text:
Lifelink At the beginning of your second main phase, if an opponent has four or more cards in their graveyard and you don't control an artifact named Collapsing Charges Mineshaft Foreman becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
{T}, Sacrifice Collapsing Charges: Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: (Flickerer) // Ghostly Flicker
card.text:
Vigilance Whenever you draw your third card each turn, (Flickerer) becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Exile two target artifacts, creatures, and/or lands you control, then return those cards to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Gaze of Derukoskai
card.text: Enchant player Whenever Gaze of Derukoskai or another permanent enters, enchanted player loses 1 life.

card.name: (fighter)
card.text: Enchant creature you control When (fighter) enters, enchanted creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature or battle. Enchanted creature gets +2/+1.

card.name: (Mabuse Almost)
card.text: When (Mabuse Almost) enters, each player creates a tapped Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.") Whenever a player sacrifices an artifact, each of that player's opponents creates a 1/1 white Dude creature token.

card.name: Synesthetic Curator // Learn from the Past
card.text:
Flash Flying Whenever Synesthetic Curator attacks, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target player shuffles their graveyard into their library. Draw a card.

card.name: Irrepressible Instinct
card.text: Untap target creature you control. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase. Only the chosen creature can attack during that combat phase and only one creature can block it that combat if able.

card.name: Fostering Sphinx
card.text: Trample, vigilance When Fostering Sphinx enters, mill five cards. You may return a nonland permanent card and a land card milled this way to your hand. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Watcher of Nowhere
card.text: Whenever you create one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on Watcher of Nowhere.

card.name: (Studier forever)
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, create a Thesis token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.")

card.name: Responses to Trauma
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Responses to Trauma enters, if it was cast, each opponent discards a card. When Responses to Trauma is defeated, create a 2/2 black Eye Horror creature token.

card.name: Try and Try Again
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Try and Try Again enters or is defeated, you may create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature you control. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of your next turn's end step.

card.name: Gatekeeping
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Gatekeeping enters or is defeated, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't, search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: (Shpinx)
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 colorless Scout artifact creature token.

card.name: (smash)
card.text: Haste Damage can't be prevented. Players can't gain life.

card.name: Sower of Kernels
card.text: Other Elementals you control get +1/+1. {3}{G}, Exile Sower of Kernels from your graveyard: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a Elemental, land, or riddle card, put it into your hand, and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
Flying
Flying Maftet?

card.name: Force of Savagery SPX
card.text: Trample (This token's mana cost is {2}{G}.)

card.name: Thesis SPX
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.

card.name: Primordial Might SPX
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+1. (This token's mana cost is {1}{BG}.)

card.name: Ancient Majesty SPX
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control. (This token's mana cost is {1}{BG}{BG}.)

card.name: Wild Growth SPX
card.text: Enchant land Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}. (This token's mana cost is {G}.)

card.name: (lander) SPX
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land is a 4/4 creature with haste and "When this land dies, return it to the battlefield tapped." It's still a land. (This token's mana cost is {2}{G}{G}.)

card.name: (Deal with Demon) SPX
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has "Sacrifice another creature: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it." (This token's mana cost is {1}{B}.)

card.name: Keen Sense SPX
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature deals damage to an opponent, you may draw a card.

card.name: Construct SPX
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Treasure SPX
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Elemental SPX
card.text: Flying

card.name: Eye Horror SPX
card.text: Flying

card.name: Shapeshifter SPX
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.)

card.name: Collapsing Charges SPX
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile target player's graveyard. (This token's mana cost is {1}.)

card.name: Bonesplitter SPX
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.) (This token's mana cost is {1}.)

card.name: Prismatic Lens SPX
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. (This token's mana cost is {2}.)

card.name: Manalith SPX
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. (This token's mana cost is {3}.)

card.name: Lotus Petal SPX
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. (This token's mana cost is {0}.)

card.name: Knight SPX
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: All for Naught
card.text: Destroy target artifact or battle. You gain 3 life.

card.name: The Hero's Journey
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When The Hero's Journey enters, create two 2/2 white Knight creature tokens with vigilance. When The Hero's Journey is defeated, create a token that's a copy of target token you control.

card.name: Motives of the Fae
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Motives of the Fae enters or is defeated, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Arcane Anomaly
card.text: (As this enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You can attack it. Creatures attacking it alone have flying.) When Arcane Anomaly enters, it deals 4 damage to any other target. When Arcane Anomaly is defeated, each creature you control becomes prepared. (Only creatures with prepare spells can become prepared.)

card.name: Potentiate Key
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Potentiate Key and a land: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {7}, {T}, Sacrifice Potentiate Key: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Wise Edifice
card.text: The first time you cast an artifact spell each turn, you may pay {3}. If you do, copy it.

card.name: Cultivated Meadow
card.text: Cultivated Meadow enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Encroaching Sands
card.text: Choose one — • Token creatures get -3/-3 until end of turn. • Nontoken creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Elevated District
card.text: Elevated District enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Layered Framework
card.text: Layered Framework enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Monstrous Habitat
card.text: Monstrous Habitat enters tapped if permanents you control could produce three or more colors. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Sensory Scramble
card.text: Choose up to two. If Sensory Scramble was a miracle, instead choose four and you may choose the same mode more than once. • Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Miracle {2}{B}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Leave to the Sands
card.text: Destroy target creature. If Leave to the Sands was a miracle, you gain 3 life. Miracle {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Gilded Necrotect
card.text: Flying When Gilded Necrotect enters, if it was a miracle, put two +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever you draw a card, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Miracle {3}{U}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Forced Perspective
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If Forced Perspective was a miracle, draw a card. Miracle {2}{U} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Devious Tremorlisk
card.text: Reach When Devious Tremorlisk enters, you gain 4 life. If Devious Tremorlisk was a miracle, you gain 7 life instead. Miracle {5}{G}{G} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Desert's Claim
card.text: Exile target creature if it's tapped or if Desert's Claim was a miracle. Miracle {1}{W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Bolt from the Blue
card.text: Bolt from the Blue deals 2 damage to any target. If Bolt from the Blue was a miracle, it deals 4 damage to that target instead. Miracle {2}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Bloodshot Beholder
card.text: When Bloodshot Beholder enters, you may discard a card. If you do, Bloodshot Beholder deals damage to up to one nonplayer target equal to half the amount of mana spent to cast Bloodshot Beholder, rounded up. Miracle {X}{2}{R}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (The thesis)
card.text: Create a tapped Thesis token. If (The thesis) was a miracle, create two of those tokens instead. (Theses are artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.) Miracle {1}{UB}{UB} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (The Intangible Vritue)
card.text: Token creatures you control get +1/+1. When (The Intangible Vritue) enters, if it as a miracle, create two 1/1 white Advisor creature tokens. Miracle {4}{W}{W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (Snappiestcaster Mage)
card.text: Flash When (Snappiestcaster Mage) enters, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. If that card's mana value is 4 or less and (Snappiestcaster Mage) was a miracle, the flashback cost is {0} instead. Miracle {3}{U} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (Raise Dead)
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If (Raise Dead) was a miracle, return it to the battlefield instead. Miracle {3}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (Miracle Mythic)
card.text: Miracle—Tap three untapped creatures you control. (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.) Draw three cards.

card.name: (Kicker Kicked Miracle)
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to another target creature. If (Kicker Kicked Miracle) was a miracle, it does twice that amount of damage instead. Miracle {1}{G} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (Go Mriacle)
card.text: Flying (Go Mriacle) can't block creatures without flying. When (Go Mriacle) enters, if it was a miracle, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. Miracle {3}{U} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (double clone)
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. If you controlled it or if this spell was a miracle, create a token that's a copy of it. Miracle {3}{U}{U} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (discarder)
card.text: Target opponent discards a card. If this card was a miracle and it isn't that player's draw step, instead that player discards three cards. Miracle {3}{B}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (deal damage to all)
card.text: (deal damage to all) deals 1 damage to each creature, planeswalker, and battle. If (deal damage to all) was a miracle, it deals 2 damage to each creature, planeswalker, and battle instead. Miracle {1}{R} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: (aura)
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it if it's a miracle. You may choose new targets for the copy. Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or battle, draw a card. Miracle {2}{G}{G} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: // omen cycle
card.text:
Miracle cost (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.text:
Miracle cost (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)
